aiChat.coachDescription: Ask for a hint, a gentler explanation, or a tiny quiz without leaving your learning path.
aiChat.description: A friendly study companion for lessons, practice, reports, and assignment planning.
aiChat.emptyDescription: Start with a question from class or pick a quick prompt. The coach keeps answers short, kind, and focused on learning.
aiChat.placeholder: Ask for help with a lesson, assignment, or practice question...
aiChat.promptExplain: Explain this lesson like I am new to it.
aiChat.promptQuiz: Give me a quick quiz to check my understanding.
aiChat.promptReview: Help me review what I should practice today.
aiChat.title: AI Chat

assignments.description: {count, plural, =0 {Your quest board is clear.} one {One quest is waiting for you.} other {# quests are waiting for you.}}
assignments.empty: No assignments are due right now.
assignments.title: Assignments

auth.bentoLead: Courses, assignments, reports, and marks stay connected so every learner knows the next useful step.
auth.bentoTitle: A calmer path from practice to progress
auth.footerLine: Use the same Learn account for focused lessons, parent views, and classroom progress.
auth.formSubtitle: Use your school email and password, or request a one-time email code.
auth.heroLead: Learn turns classroom work into short practice loops, visible progress, and parent-ready insight without sending learners back through the admin platform.
auth.otpSent: Check your email for the code.
auth.parentsCardBody: Linked parents can follow progress without changing student work.
auth.practiceCardBody: Short practice sessions, hearts, XP, and streaks keep students moving without turning schoolwork into noise.
auth.reportsCardBody: Marks and reports come from the same education workspace teachers already manage.
auth.socialLoginLead: Social sign-ins are completed securely on tuturuuu.com, then returned to Learn.
auth.subtitle: Practice, lessons, assignments, and progress in one learner-friendly place.
auth.title: Welcome to Learn

courses.empty: Your teacher has not assigned courses yet.
courses.loadError: We could not load this course. Try again in a moment.
courses.mapDescription: Follow the course path, unlock each checkpoint, and keep every lesson visible at a glance.
courses.moduleEmpty: This module has no content yet.
courses.moduleHint: Work through the content, then return to pick another module.
courses.publishedModules: {count, plural, one {# published module} other {# published modules}}
courses.selectModule: Select a module to view its content
courses.title: Courses

home.heroDescription: Choose a tiny mission, protect your hearts, and keep your learning streak moving.
home.learningPathDescription: Every course becomes a path of checkpoints, current lessons, and wins you can see.
home.planAssignmentsBody: Handle the visible work first so nothing slips into tomorrow.
home.planPracticeBody: Start with a short review before opening the next lesson.
home.questAssignmentsCount: {count, plural, one {One assignment needs attention.} other {# assignments need attention.}}
home.questBoardDescription: {count, plural, =0 {No open quests right now.} one {One open quest left.} other {# open quests left.}}
home.questPracticeDescription: A short review keeps the next lesson easier.
home.title: Home
home.todayPlanDescription: A compact route through practice, assignments, and course progress for the current workspace.
home.toolkitAiBody: Open the learner chat for a guided hint, not a full dashboard detour.
home.toolkitAssignmentsBody: Check every due task with the course context still attached.
home.toolkitCoursesBody: Jump back into checkpoints, modules, and locked lessons.
home.toolkitDescription: Fast learner tools for practice, AI help, course progress, assignments, and reports.
home.toolkitPracticeBody: Run a short warm-up before the next teacher-led module.
home.toolkitReportsBody: Read recent scores, attendance signals, and teacher notes in one place.

assignments.body: Assignments stay visible as small next steps, not another admin queue.
assignments.title: Clear work

courses.body: Course modules turn into a learner path with checkpoints, current lessons, and practice.
courses.title: Course path

progress.body: Reports, marks, and parent views read from the same education workspace teachers manage.
progress.title: Shared progress

landing.lead: Learn is the learner-facing app for Tuturuuu education workspaces. Students practice, follow course modules, clear assignments, and read progress without entering the teacher dashboard.
landing.panelBody: Auth stays with the Tuturuuu platform. After sign-in, Learn opens the right workspace dashboard for the current learner or linked parent.
landing.title: Focused lessons, practice, and progress.

marks.description: Marks are grouped as friendly score cards so students and parents can spot growth quickly.
marks.empty: Marks will appear after your teacher records them.
marks.title: Marks

practice.description: Answer one small challenge, get immediate feedback, and earn XP for the session.
practice.retryHint: A retry keeps the path warm.
practice.title: Practice

reports.description: Read teacher feedback as simple progress notes for students and parents.
reports.empty: Reports will appear after your teacher publishes them.
reports.title: Reports

settings.description: Personalize the learner profile, theme, and study rhythm for a calmer daily routine.
settings.title: Settings

workspace.empty: No education workspace is available for this account.
